root.fld: By SWIFT, requesting the correspondent Bank to issue their guarantee against counter guarantee
Dynamic variables can be included in reference prefix and suffix. When generating a customer reference,the variable you have added to prefix and suffix will be replaced by the system automatically.
For example,the system will replace '${Y}' with the current year,such as '2018'.

New Expiry date can not be earlier than the Expiry date!
New Expiry date can not be the same as the current date!
New LC expiry date can not be earlier than the amendment date
New LC expiry date can not be earlier than the latest shipment date
New LC expiry date can not be earlier than the new latest shipment date

New LC Amount cannot less than 0.

New latest shipment date can not be later than the new LC expiry date
New latest shipment date can not be later than LC expiry date

Choose a file from your local disk.
Press "Upload" button to confirm and upload the file. It may take a few minutes for business validation from the bank before further processing.
SBR Reference No. is mandatory if the Message Type is "Invoice" and the file format is PDF, JPG, or PNG.
Multiple messages should be zipped into a ZIP file.
